summary: Iteration 7 - Analytics Dashboard (P1) Testing Complete. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend analytics page verified with all components working: overview cards, popular docs chart, search queries table, chatbot usage chart, and recent activity. Analytics link visible in sidebar for admin users. Existing features (home, document viewer, search, editor) verified working without regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Analytics endpoints at lines 617-695 in server.py - well structured with proper aggregation pipelines
Document view tracking via POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/view at line 617 - works correctly
Search query logging integrated at line 425 in search endpoint - logs to search_logs collection
Frontend AnalyticsPage component at lines 1136-1299 - clean implementation with proper data-testid attributes
Sidebar analytics link correctly gated by isAdmin check at line 595
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data, created TEST_SEARCH_ query for search logging verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Dashboard (P1) fully functional. All analytics endpoints return correct data structures. Document view tracking fires on DocumentViewer component mount (useEffect at line 673-676 of App.js). Search queries are logged automatically when users search. Chatbot analytics pulls from chat_messages collection. Views_7d and chats_7d use 7-day trailing window based on ISO timestamps.

analytics_overview_endpoint.details: Returns total_docs, total_views, total_searches, total_chats, views_7d, chats_7d

analytics_popular_docs_endpoint.details: Returns list sorted by view count with doc_id, views, title, category_id

analytics_searches_endpoint.details: Returns aggregated search queries with count and last_searched

analytics_chatbot_endpoint.details: Returns total, daily array (14 days), and recent questions

document_view_tracking.details: POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/view tracks views, increments count correctly

analytics_page_ui.details: All components render: 6 overview cards, popular docs chart, search table, chatbot chart, recent activity

sidebar_analytics_link.details: Analytics link visible in sidebar for admin users
